idea-plugin.name: Midnight Tide
idea-plugin.description:
Midnight Tide

A cool-blue dark theme built for JetBrains' Islands layout. Forked directly from Islands Dark with three surgical changes:

  • Editor background remapped to #151719 on a cooler chrome tier
  • Teal accent (#0891B2) for selection, focus rings, and the action button
  • Diff line colors swapped to JetBrains' deuteranopia palette — colorblind-safe out of the box

Syntax highlighting inherits Islands Dark's tokens unchanged: purple keywords, teal identifiers and numbers, sky-blue strings. Selection, gutter, popups, and all ~190 other color keys carry over from Islands Dark verbatim.

Setup: Settings → Appearance & Behavior → Appearance → Theme → Midnight Tide. Then Settings → Editor → Color Scheme → Midnight Tide. For the floating-panel look, also enable "Different tool window background" in the Appearance settings.

Requires IDE 2025.3+ for the Islands Dark parent theme.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.2 — Updated vendor/publisher to Chelayel.

1.0.1 — Coral search field text; unified true-error palette around coral #E88F89 (errors no longer collide with amber warnings); lifted indent guides and caret-row; faint resting scrollbar; bright-red and bright-green terminal colors actually read as red/green; link color separated from teal accent.

1.0.0 — Initial release.
